series_metadata.series_description: Includes records created, sent, or received by the Board, which convey information of temporary importance, including, but not limited to: electronic mail, electronic messages, phone messages, phone logs, post-it notes, calendars, facsimile cover sheets, notes to convey information, notes for follow-up, drafts of documents upon which no official agency action is taken, routine correspondence, routine e-mail, and routine voice mail. [Note: routine correspondence, e-mail and voice mail pertain to communication of generic information; if to the public, frequently by standard form letters or publications.]

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until information has no further value, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until information has no further value, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
